name: James Bond
description: Fictional British spy (Agent 007) from Ian Fleming’s novels and film franchise.

name: Albert Einstein
description: Physicist known for relativity and transforming modern physics.

name: Marie Curie
description: Pioneer of radioactivity; first person to win two Nobel Prizes in different sciences.

name: Ada Lovelace
description: Early computing pioneer; wrote influential notes on the Analytical Engine.

name: Nelson Mandela
description: Anti-apartheid leader and South Africa’s first Black president.

name: Steve Jobs
description: Apple co-founder who helped popularize personal computing and modern consumer tech.

name: Serena Williams
description: Tennis champion with major impact on the sport and cultural visibility.

name: William Shakespeare
description: English playwright and poet whose works shaped literature and language.

name: Martin Luther King Jr.
description: Civil rights leader who advanced nonviolent protest and U.S. civil rights progress.

name: Leonardo da Vinci
description: Renaissance artist and inventor with lasting influence in art, science, and engineering.
